Skills.Name: Axe
Skills.Description: Mastery of axes — heavy chopping arcs that carry through to the next foe.

Powers.Name: Cleave
Powers.Description: Axe-class hits have a chance to swing through to one adjacent enemy, dealing half damage.

Powers.Name: Expertise
Powers.Description: +2 to-hit while wielding an Axe-class weapon (Battleaxe / Hatchet).

Powers.Name: Berserk
Powers.Description: Active ability: enter a 5-turn blood frenzy — +5 Strength, -2 DV. 100-turn cooldown. Requires an Axe weapon equipped.

Powers.Name: Dismember
Powers.Description: Axe hits have a small chance to dismember a non-vital body part (arm, leg, hand, foot, etc.) — the target loses the limb and starts bleeding. Mortal parts (head, heart) are safe from this passive; that's Decapitate's territory.

Powers.Name: Decapitate
Powers.Description: Marker skill that opens up vital anatomy (head, heart) to your Dismember procs. Without this skill your axe spares the head; with it, an unlucky enemy may lose theirs. Requires Dismember to actually fire.

Powers.Name: Hook and Drag
Powers.Description: Active ability: swing at an adjacent enemy and bury the axe — they're hooked. Each turn, hooked targets are dragged 1 cell toward you (Strength save to break free, vs target 20). Lasts up to 9 turns. 50-turn cooldown. Requires an Axe weapon equipped.

Powers.Name: Whirlwind
Powers.Description: Active ability: spin once, striking every adjacent creature with a full weapon swing. On-hit procs (Cleave, Dismember) fire per target. 50-turn cooldown. Requires an Axe weapon equipped.

Powers.Name: Rend Armor
Powers.Description: Active ability: a deliberate cleave that bypasses damage and applies 3 stacks of ShatterArmor directly — defender's effective AV drops by 6. 30-turn cooldown. Requires an Axe weapon equipped.
